states.desc_zh: 项目刚搭起的最初状态：6 个用户级 skill + 5 个 builtin。一条 founder → meta → desktop → closeout → ip 的主生命周期链。
states.desc_en: The very first state: 6 user skills + 5 builtins. One main lifecycle chain founder → meta → desktop → closeout → ip.
bullets_zh: 6 个用户级 skill：ADK、CR、NF、SPT、PAT、SCS
5 个 builtin（虚线边框）：GM、RW、ASR、FE、PW
主链：SPT → ADK → NF → CR → PAT → SCS
bullets_en: 6 user skills: ADK, CR, NF, SPT, PAT, SCS
5 builtins (dashed): GM, RW, ASR, FE, PW
Main chain: SPT → ADK → NF → CR → PAT → SCS

states.desc_zh: tooling 域块自动创建，GPS 节点孤立加入。agent 自动添加 toolingDomain classDef。
states.desc_en: tooling domain block is auto-created; GPS joins as isolated node. Agent adds toolingDomain classDef.
states.delta_zh: +1 node (GPS in tooling) · +1 classDef · +1 self-loop edge · PNG 224500 → 259330 (+15.5%)
states.delta_en: +1 node (GPS in tooling) · +1 classDef · +1 self-loop edge · PNG 224500 → 259330 (+15.5%)
bullets_zh: 推断结果：tooling 域（命中 ppt / swiss style / html，得分 3）
新节点：GPS[guizang-ppt-skill]:::toolingDomain
新边：GPS 自环 fallback（同域无 peer）
bullets_en: Inference: tooling (matched ppt / swiss style / html, score 3)
New node: GPS[guizang-ppt-skill]:::toolingDomain
New edge: GPS self-loop (no same-domain peer yet)

states.desc_zh: skill 的 description 过宽，关键词推断返回 uncategorized，agent 提示用户手工归 meta。SC 与 ADK 同域，自动加 dashed 边。
states.desc_en: Description too generic; inference returns uncategorized; user manually picks meta. SC joins meta with ADK; dashed same-domain edge added.
states.delta_zh: +1 node (SC in meta) · +1 same-domain edge → ADK · PNG 259330 → 270529 (+4.3%)
states.delta_en: +1 node (SC in meta) · +1 same-domain edge → ADK · PNG 259330 → 270529 (+4.3%)
bullets_zh: 推断结果：uncategorized → 用户手选 meta
新节点：SC[skill-creator]:::metaDomain
新边：SC -. "同域" .-> ADK
bullets_en: Inference: uncategorized → user picks meta manually
New node: SC[skill-creator]:::metaDomain
New edge: SC -. "same domain" .-> ADK

states.desc_zh: agent-reach 是个特殊 skill —— 来自 Python CLI 工具（pipx install agent-reach），SKILL.md 落在 ~/.agents/skills/。通过软链桥接到 opencode 和 portal。归入 tooling 域，与 GPS 同域。
states.desc_en: agent-reach is a special skill — it ships as a Python CLI (pipx install agent-reach) and writes SKILL.md to ~/.agents/skills/. Symlinked into opencode and portal. Classified as tooling, peer to GPS.
states.delta_zh: +1 node (AR in tooling) · +1 same-domain edge → GPS · PNG 270529 → 280641 (+3.7%)
states.delta_en: +1 node (AR in tooling) · +1 same-domain edge → GPS · PNG 270529 → 280641 (+3.7%)
bullets_zh: 推断结果：meta（命中 agent）→ 手工归到 tooling（更符合「横切层」定位）
新节点：AR[agent-reach]:::toolingDomain
新边：AR -. "同域" .-> GPS（tooling 域内 peer 已存在）
桥接：~/.config/opencode/skills/agent-reach → ~/.agents/skills/agent-reach（symlink）
bullets_en: Inference: meta (matched 'agent') → manually reclassified to tooling (better fits cross-cutting)
New node: AR[agent-reach]:::toolingDomain
New edge: AR -. "same domain" .-> GPS (tooling now has a peer)
Bridge: ~/.config/opencode/skills/agent-reach → ~/.agents/skills/agent-reach (symlink)

states.title_zh: State 4：装 superpowers 全套（14 个 sub-skill）
states.desc_zh: obra/superpowers 是一个 monorepo 形态的 skill 集合——14 个独立 sub-skill 覆盖工程方法论：brainstorm / TDD / subagent / debug / review 全链。8 个归 meta 域（方法论与工程基础设施），6 个归 closeout 域（review/branch/verification）。一次性装入，让 agent 拥有完整的「decompose → execute → review → finish」能力。
states.desc_en: obra/superpowers ships as a monorepo of 14 sub-skills covering engineering methodology: brainstorm / TDD / subagent / debug / review end-to-end. 8 go to meta (methodology + infra), 6 go to closeout (review/branch/verification). Installed in one shot — gives agents the full decompose → execute → review → finish loop.
states.delta_zh: +14 nodes (8 meta + 6 closeout) · meta 域 2→10 · closeout 域 1→7 · PNG 280641 → 508189 (+81%)
states.delta_en: +14 nodes (8 meta + 6 closeout) · meta domain 2→10 · closeout domain 1→7 · PNG 280641 → 508189 (+81%)
bullets_zh: monorepo 形态：obra/superpowers 仓库下 skills/ 子目录里 14 个独立 SKILL.md，每个走 portal API 单独装
推断挑战：14 个里 7 个返回 uncategorized，agent 按 "工程方法论 → meta，提交闭环 → closeout" 原则手工归类
meta 域新增 8 个：brainstorming / dispatching-parallel-agents / subagent-driven-development / systematic-debugging / test-driven-development / using-superpowers / writing-plans / writing-skills
closeout 域新增 6 个：executing-plans / finishing-a-development-branch / receiving-code-review / requesting-code-review / using-git-worktrees / verification-before-completion
图谱体积：280641 → 508189 字节（+81%），meta/closeout 两个域块都明显变大
核心价值：让 agent 在做复杂工程时有「先 brainstorm、再写 plan、然后 TDD、并行 dispatch、最后 verify-before-completion」的方法论支架
bullets_en: Monorepo form: 14 independent SKILL.md under obra/superpowers/skills/, each installed via portal API one by one
Inference challenge: 7 of 14 returned uncategorized; agent manually classified by 'engineering methodology → meta, commit closeout → closeout'
meta domain +8: brainstorming / dispatching-parallel-agents / subagent-driven-development / systematic-debugging / test-driven-development / using-superpowers / writing-plans / writing-skills
closeout domain +6: executing-plans / finishing-a-development-branch / receiving-code-review / requesting-code-review / using-git-worktrees / verification-before-completion
Graph size: 280641 → 508189 bytes (+81%), both meta and closeout domain blocks visibly grew
Core value: gives agents methodology scaffolding for complex work — brainstorm first, write plan, then TDD, dispatch in parallel, verify before completion

states.desc_zh: 带 citation 的远程知识库 — 让 agent 调 Google NotebookLM 问你的个人文档库，Gemini 仅基于上传的文档回答，每条回复带出处引用。归 tooling 域，与 agent-reach（互联网读取）、guizang-ppt-skill（PPT 生成）共同构成横切层「外部信息源接入」三件套。
states.desc_en: Citation-grounded remote knowledge base — lets agents query your personal Google NotebookLM library; Gemini answers strictly from your uploaded documents with citations attached. Goes to tooling domain, joining agent-reach (internet read) and guizang-ppt-skill (PPT generation) as the three external-information adapters.
states.delta_zh: +1 node (N in tooling) · tooling 域 2→3 · PNG 508189 → 521852 (+2.7%)
bullets_zh: Browser 自动化查询 NotebookLM，每问一次开独立 session 再关闭
Gemini 仅从你上传的文档里拿答案 — 严重压低 hallucination，每条带 citation 出处
smart-add：扔个 NotebookLM URL 进来，先查一次问内容自动生成 description/topics 再入库
需要 Google 账号认证（Cookie 持久化在本机）+ Python + playwright/browser-use
tooling 域第 3 个成员：与 agent-reach（互联网公共信息）、guizang-ppt-skill（PPT 输出）形成「读外部 / 写内部」工具集
bullets_en: Browser automation queries NotebookLM, each question opens a fresh session then closes
Gemini answers strictly from your uploaded documents — hallucinations drastically reduced, every reply has citations
smart-add: drop a NotebookLM URL, the skill queries it first to auto-generate description/topics before registering
Requires Google auth (cookies persisted locally) + Python + playwright/browser-use
3rd tooling member: with agent-reach (public internet) and guizang-ppt-skill (PPT output), forms the read-external / write-internal tool trio
